creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

I'm trying to upgrade gitlab-ce from 13.5.4 to gitlab-ce-13.8.1_1.

I get the following:

# su -l git -c "cd /usr/local/www/gitlab-ce && rake db:migrate RAILS_ENV=production"
Assertion failed: (elem_size_lg2 <= 4), function _upb_tag_arrptr, file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/grpc/work/grpc-1.35.0/third_party/upb/upb/msg.h, line 229.

This is on 12.2-RELEASE amd64, in a jail. Worked fine through a few previous upgrades.
